creator: draco@marino.st
text:
On 4/23/2012 08:49, Frederic Culot wrote:
> Hi John,
>
> I have committed your update for gnat-aux and I am currently working on
> gnatdroid-arm* updates but I wanted to make sure of something: when I apply your
> patch I get all the patches in files/* emptied. Is it what is expected or is
> there something wrong with the patch?

Hi Frederic,
Yes, that is expected.  It's even listed in the description of 
ports/166719: "Note that every patch in the "files" directory as been 
deleted, so the directory itself can be removed."

So if applying the PR patch results in an empty files directory, it's 
behaving exactly as expected.  The next gnat-aux now has these patches 
by default which is why it had to be updated before this PR.

Regards,
John
